text:

> With 20 dc interfaces in my machine and "option BRIDGE" in the kernel,

I think that this is Luigi's domain, but I don't want to assign the PR
to him when I'm not sure.

Luigi, wanna take this one? :-)

Ciao,
Sheldon.
